query:
SELECT
            user_id,
            MIN(created_at) as "session_start?: i64",
            MAX(created_at) as "session_end?: i64",
            COUNT(*) as "song_count?: i64",
            (SELECT username FROM user_accountz WHERE id = mpe.user_id LIMIT 1) as "username?"
        FROM music_play_eventz mpe
        WHERE session_id = ?
        GROUP BY user_id
